title: No more recipes
description: Deletes all recipes from the recipe book
body:
**No More Recipes** is a simple mod that completely clears the Recipe Book in Minecraft. Even if you unlock a recipe or find new items, the book will stay empty.

This is perfect for players who want a clean UI or want to play from memory without the game showing them how to craft everything.

**Features**



- Total Clear: No recipes will ever show up in the crafting book.

- Always Empty: Even after you "unlock" a recipe, it will not appear.

- Vanilla Style: Works perfectly with the standard game interface.

- Lightweight: Does not affect game performance.

**Why use this?**


- For a cleaner crafting screen without extra icons.

- For Hardcore/Realism playstyles where you have to remember recipes yourself.

- For Modpacks where the recipe book might feel too cluttered.
